disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive dysphagia over four months, stepping down from solids to soft foods to liquids, now unable to swallow water
trigger_question_examples: When did the swallowing trouble start and how has it changed?
Is it worse with solids, liquids, or both?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been getting worse for about four months. At first only meat and solid food stuck, then soft food, and in the last two days I can't even get water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound unintentional weight loss (about 15 kg over three months)
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How have your clothes been fitting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a huge amount of weight without trying — maybe 15 kilos in three months. My clothes just hang off me now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Coughing and choking immediately on swallowing liquids — aspiration risk
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you try to drink?
Do you cough or choke when you swallow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The moment I try to sip water I start coughing and choking and it comes straight back up. It feels like it goes the wrong way.

trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt when you swallow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it burns terribly right behind my breastbone every time I try to swallow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Regurgitation of foul-smelling, undigested food retained above the obstruction
trigger_question_examples: Do you bring food back up, and does it look digested?
Does what comes up smell bad or look like old food?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep bringing up food I ate hours before — it's undigested and smells foul.
Now that you mention it, my voice has gone hoarse and croaky over the last while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing severe gastro-oesophageal reflux disease (chronic risk-factor baseline)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing stomach or reflux problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had bad heartburn and reflux for years and just take antacids, but they don't touch it anymore.

trigger_question_examples: Do you smoke, and how much over the years?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've been a heavy smoker for most of my life.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to maintain oral hydration or nutrition, with marked weakness and being mostly bedbound (dehydration proxy)
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down at all?
How much have you managed to drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't keep anything down — not even water. I'm completely drained, weak and mostly stuck in bed.
